name: Study
description: Dedicate time to focused learning. Books, notes, and concentration sharpen the mind.
logMessage: You dedicated time to focused studying.

name: Attend Class
description: Go to a formal lesson or lecture. Structured learning and interaction with others.
logMessage: You attended class and took part in the lesson.

name: Research
description: Dive deep into a topic. Explore sources, connect ideas, and expand your understanding.
logMessage: You dove deep into research and expanded your understanding.

name: Take Exam
description: Sit for a formal assessment. Put your knowledge to the test.
logMessage: You sat for an exam and put your knowledge to the test.

name: Work Shift
description: Put in hours at your job. Earn money and gain experience in your field.
logMessage: You put in a solid shift at work.

name: Network
description: Attend professional events, reach out to contacts, and build your professional circle.
logMessage: You networked and built your professional circle.

name: Apply for Job
description: Search for opportunities and submit applications. Take a step toward better work.

name: Side Project
description: Work on something outside your main job. Creative or entrepreneurial pursuits.
logMessage: You worked on a side project.

name: Exercise
description: Get moving. Run, lift, swim, or play—strengthen your body and clear your mind.
logMessage: You exercised and strengthened your body.

name: Rest
description: Take a break. Sleep, relax, and let your body recover.
logMessage: You rested and let your body recover.

name: Medical Checkup
description: Visit a doctor for a routine examination. Prevention and peace of mind.
logMessage: You went for a medical checkup.

name: Meditate
description: Sit in stillness. Breathe, observe, and find calm within.
logMessage: You meditated and found calm within.

name: Spend Time with Friend
description: Meet up with someone you care about. Conversation, laughter, connection.
logMessage: You spent time with a friend.

name: Make New Friend
description: Put yourself out there. Strike up a conversation, join a group, or say yes to an invitation.
logMessage: You put yourself out there and made a new friend.

name: Help Someone
description: Offer your time or skills to someone in need. Volunteer, assist, or lend a hand.

name: Party
description: Let loose at a social gathering. Music, drinks, and late nights—fun but taxing.
logMessage: You went to a party and let loose.
